chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-186 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 30.04.2025 Mr. Atta Hussain Qadri, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh, assisted by Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w SIP Ali Dost on behalf of S.S.P. Larkana. ------ Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh files statement on behalf of S.S.P. Larkana, taken on record. The case of petitioner is that he was appointed as Police Constable on 18.10.2008; however, due to certain problems in his family, he could not perform his duty; resultantly report regarding his absence from the duty was submitted and competent authority, i.e. S.S.P. Larkana had dismissed him from service in terms of his Order No.OB/312, dated 09.09.2021. He filed Appeal before D.I.G.P. Larkana, that too was dismissed by way of Order No.E-11/9511-13/2022, Larkana dated 04.03.2022, available as Annexure “B” at page 21 of the Court file. The petitioner approached the Inspector General of Police, Sindh at Karachi, but could not succeed to present his Appeal; hence filed instant petition and seeks its disposal that the prayer of the petition may be allowed to submit fresh Appeal against the Order, passed by D.I.G.P. Larkana before I.G.P. Sindh for prayer so made through this petition. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh has no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby disposed of. The petitioner, however, undertakes to submit his Appeal before I.G.P, Sindh, Karachi against the order passed by D.I.G.P.

Accordingly, instant petition is hereby disposed of. The petitioner, however, undertakes to submit his Appeal before I.G.P, Sindh, Karachi against the order passed by D.I.G.P. Larkana within thirty days. After submission of his Appeal, I.G.P.Sindh, Karachi, shall hear the same after providing equal opportunities to all concerned and decide its fate within three months’ time under intimation to this Court through learned Additional Registrar. A copy of this order be sent through fax today to I.G.P.Sindh, Karachi for compliance. Copy be also provided to the office of the Additional Advocate General, Sindh for correspondence and compliance. Learned Additional Registrar is directed to ensure compliance. Judge Judge Manzoor
